title: ClownCraft
description: replaces some textures with clown ones
body:
🤡 **ClownCraft:** Minecraft Resource Pack 🤡

Experience a nightmarish carnival in Minecraft! 🎪 This resource pack brings terrifying changes to your world, transforming familiar elements into a spooky spectacle. 

Just visuals, but with a chilling effect:

* The Totem of Undying becomes a clown's head! 🤡 Instead of a calming symbol, you'll be greeted by a terrifying grin.
* The sword turns green and poisonous! 🗡 Instead of the usual metallic shine, you'll be met with a cold green light, foreshadowing misfortune.
* And many more unexpected details! 😱 Not all changes are immediately obvious, but the atmosphere of the game will definitely become more eerie.

This resource pack is for those who:

* Love atmospheric changes.
* Look for new sensations in the game.
* Want to add some horror to their game world.

Prepare for unpredictable encounters and scary adventures! 👻 

Download the resource pack now and dive into the world of a nightmarish carnival!
